appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for Foundation Milestone with isolation rules, boundaries, and test data setup instructions

notes: Flow validators were spawned and executed browser automation (evidence: screenshots collected in auth1/ directory). However, structured JSON test reports were not generated by the subagents.
